title: Flowing Arabic Floral Trail
description: A gorgeous flowing leaf and flower trail extending diagonally across the back of the hand.

title: Minimalist Finger Bands
description: Clean and delicate geometric bands surrounding the fingers, perfect for a modern everyday look.

title: Classic Indian Bridal Palm
description: Heavy bridal pattern featuring peacocks, checkerboards, and intricate netting over the palm.

title: Royal Rajasthani Hand Design
description: Traditional Rajasthani elephant motifs, palace arches, and dense paisley filler patterns.

title: Dainty Leafy Wrist Cuff
description: A simple vine wrapped around the wrist, resembling a delicate organic bracelet.

title: Modern Arabic Wrist Vine
description: Bold shading and clean leafy lines that transition smoothly from the wrist to the index finger.

title: Traditional Indian Circle Pattern
description: A beautiful circular mandala motif on the palm, surrounded by detailed finger patterns.

title: Rajasthani Checkerboard Palm
description: Striking grid panels filled with dots and small floral highlights, classic to desert styles.

title: Abstract Dots & Lines
description: Ultra-minimalist dots along the knuckles and clean vertical accents down the hand.

title: Rich Arabic Rose Motif
description: Layers of shaded roses and thick borders that create a high-contrast decorative finish.

title: Intricate Palace Arch Mandala
description: Fine-line Rajasthani artwork featuring majestic palace arches framing a micro-mandala.

title: Sweet Pea Hand Trail
description: A light and breezy trail of leaves and dots suitable for children or quick applications.

title: Double Hand Mirror Design
description: Symmetrical bridal patterns where both hands mirror each other's peacocks and mandalas.

title: Petite Ring Finger Henna
description: A singular delicate flower on the ring finger with simple leaf tips.

title: Arabic Heavy Glove Design
description: Thick lines intertwined with fine-line shading, creating a full-coverage glove effect.

title: Graceful Peacock Trail
description: Elegant peacock heads rising from the wrist and trailing gracefully over the index finger.

title: Rajasthani Royal Elephant Motif
description: A highly detailed wrist cuff showcasing marching elephants and traditional grid patterns.

title: Criss-Cross Arabic Netting
description: Diagonally aligned grid elements bordered by bold leaves, displaying classic Arabic spacing.

title: Single Wrist Band
description: A neat bracelet-style band featuring small triangular points and single dots.

title: Elegant Lotus Mandala
description: A classic central mandala consisting of layered lotus petals and fine radial spacing.

title: Minimal Crescent Moon
description: A dainty crescent moon and star patterns located on the back hand.

title: Chic Chevron Lines
description: V-shaped chevron patterns running along the index finger with leafy wrist extensions.

title: Gilded Lotus Cuffs
description: Elaborate lotus buds inside dark negative spaces, forming a premium bridal wrist cuff.

title: Traditional Desert Sun Motif
description: Bold sunburst rays extending from a solid center, bordered by intricate swirl work.

title: Single Finger Vine
description: A simple leafy branch winding only around the middle finger.

title: Flowing Paisley Trail
description: Connected paisley elements (kalka) flowing smoothly across the hand.

title: Royal Shehnai Bridal Pattern
description: Visual motifs representing traditional instruments, combined with fine-mesh layouts.

title: Symmetrical Royal Arch
description: A symmetrical mirror pattern featuring elegant dome shapes and matching finger columns.

title: Geometric Knuckles
description: Tiny triangles and dot groupings aligned along the finger joints.

title: Asymmetrical Floral Cuff
description: Bold floral clusters concentrated on the side of the hand, fading into fine trails.
